svg.title: ECDF — No Bin-Width Required — ECDFSeries
svg.desc: Ecdf chart titled "ECDF — No Bin-Width Required — ECDFSeries". X axis: Response Time (ms). Y axis: Cumulative Proportion. Series "Control (n=400)": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 7.138381179385178) to 1 (at 89.5187443117104). Series "Treatment (n=400)": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 38.84938692230717) to 1 (at 89.04885697984326).
